description: A ground-level photograph captures a large nuclear power plant situated on a coastal landscape. The facility consists of at least five prominent, grey, dome-roofed reactor containment buildings, alongside various rectangular industrial structures, appearing in shades of concrete and beige. Towards the right side of the plant, a visible plume of white steam or smoke rises from an industrial section. In the foreground, a wide, dark, wet sandy beach with textured water marks stretches across the lower portion of the image, bordered by a strip of sand dunes covered with sparse green and dry vegetation. The sky above is clear and light blue.
